name: Only Filtering Special Elements Relative to a Marker
description: The product filters special elements only based on their position relative to a marker (such as beginning or end of string, or specific delimiters) but fails to account for special elements elsewhere in the data, allowing bypass through placement at unexpected positions.
detection_pattern: INGRESS node provides data that flows through a CONTROL node performing marker-relative filtering (anchored regex, position-relative checks) to an EGRESS or TRANSFORM node, missing special elements not adjacent to the marker.
